creator: reg@FreeBSD.org
text:
Hi,

On Thu, Sep 28, 2000 at 09:16:56AM -0700, tkato@prontomail.ne.jp wrote:
> >Synopsis:       Update port: devel/libtool to 1.3.5

I've had this in my tree since 1.3.5 was released (in May I think), but
I'm not doing the upgrade because there are no changes in the FreeBSD
related functionality.  Doing the upgrade requires that bsd.port.mk also
be changed, and that forces all Ports users to upgrade libtool.

Thanks though.

Regards,
 -Jeremy

-- 
FreeBSD - Because the best things in life are free...
                                           http://www.freebsd.org/
